subject.title: fix(nudge): verify submission by composer state + C-j recovery for swallowed Enter
subject.author: blairsilverberg

action_plan.summary: Carry forward PR #4461 as a cleanup-first replacement: centralize composer submit verification at the tmux nudge submit boundary, make stranded detection sticky, fail closed on dirty/unknown composer recovery, and reuse nudge.Requeue for drained delivery failures.

artifacts.summary: Original PR #4461 is kind/bug priority/p1 status/review-failed; replacement branch received 5/5 pre and 5/5 post approvals and is treated as review-approved for the replacement merge path.
Original PR #4461 by blairsilverberg, head fbbe7f3917e75c79fea71e2c40e80585177c3a56, labels kind/bug priority/p1 status/review-failed, no approval, no substantive CI.
Replacement implementation commit adding conservative submit verification, queue requeue consolidation, and focused tests, cherry-picked onto upstream/main.
Final reviewed replacement implementation head after gofmt cleanup, cherry-picked onto upstream/main.
Focused checks passed for internal/tmux submit verifier tests, internal/cmd nudge/requeue tests with CGO_ENABLED=0, and internal/nudge queue tests.

Broader go test ./internal/tmux -count=1 failed in TestNewSessionWithCommand_ExecEnvSuccess and TestGetPaneCommand_MultiPane because this host reports pane command coreutils instead of sleep; focused touched tmux tests pass and failure is unrelated to this branch.

Scanned labels, PR metadata, prior Sheriff bead gt-pr-sheriff-4461, current bead notes, local diff, focused tests, and post-review findings. Original PR as-is remains blocked; replacement branch blockers are resolved.

Replacement carries forward original PR #4461 intent from blairsilverberg/furiosa <blair@humcapital.com>, original commit fbbe7f3917e75c79fea71e2c40e80585177c3a56, with evidence credit in this durable report.
Original PR #4461 should be closed or marked superseded only after the replacement branch lands, with attribution preserved.

research_legs.summary: PR intent is valid but original is large, status/review-failed, lacks approval/CI, and adds broad verifier/requeue layers; replacement recommended.
Current sendEnterVerified can false-pass on pane repaint; fix belongs at NudgeSessionWithOpts/NudgePane submit boundary with sticky stranded detection.
C-j recovery is plausible only for definitely stranded nudge text; unknown states must fail closed rather than retype.
Original PR duplicated manual Enqueue loops; replacement should use existing nudge.Requeue in drainers.
Normal-intensity nudge text must override broad busy indicator matches; dim ghost text must not count as stranded.
Focused tests needed for classifier behavior, ErrSubmitNotVerified wrapping, and queue preservation on failed drained delivery.
Original PR only has label-maintenance checks; replacement needs fresh focused local evidence tied to final head.
Avoid duplicate sends and dirty-composer retry; C-j must be gated to definite nudge text.
Original PR author blairsilverberg/furiosa and commit fbbe7f3 must be credited if replacement carries intent forward.
Original PR merge-as-is is blocked by status/review-failed, no approval, no substantive verification, and prior unresolved blockers.
Approved smaller replacement: submit verifier at existing tmux boundary, nudge.Requeue for queue recovery, focused tests.
Durable defer remains valid if no replacement is produced; merge path requires replacement gates and checker.
Verification belongs in tmux transport; queue fallback belongs in command drainers; avoid duplicated recovery layers.
Validated busy false-pass, non-sticky stranded handling, dirty-composer retry, and duplicated re-enqueue loops in original PR.
Identified evidence schema, required replacement fields, 15+5+5 gates, focused verification, attribution, and checker invocation.

pre_implementation_reviews.summary: Approved existing submit boundary, sticky stranded detection, C-j gating, and nudge.Requeue use.
Approved as cleanup-aligned replacement rather than stacking on PR #4461.
Approved queue safety with no immediate dirty retry and drained-batch requeue through nudge.Requeue.
Approved with required focused classifier, error wrapping, and queue requeue tests.
Approved architecture split: tmux verifies submit; command drainers handle queue policy; attribution preserved in evidence.

post_implementation_reviews.summary: Approved final code; prior blockers addressed and focused tests present. The reviewed code was later cherry-picked cleanly onto upstream/main with identical diff.
Approved correctness and safety of submit verification and queue integration. The reviewed code was later cherry-picked cleanly onto upstream/main with identical diff.
Approved cleanup/convergence; no duplicated recovery loops or dirty immediate retry remain. The reviewed code was later cherry-picked cleanly onto upstream/main with identical diff.

Approved test coverage for normal text over busy, dim ghost, dirty composer, prefix fallback, wrapping, and requeue preservation. The reviewed code was later cherry-picked cleanly onto upstream/main with identical diff.
Approved Sheriff readiness pending evidence materialization and merge-gate checker. The reviewed code was later cherry-picked cleanly onto upstream/main with identical diff.

cleanup_first.rationale: The replacement carries forward the valid PR #4461 intent while collapsing behavior into existing tmux submit and queue requeue boundaries. It avoids original duplicated re-enqueue loops and does not immediately retry into dirty composers.

focused_checks.name: tmux submit verifier
focused_checks.reason: Focused classifier, sentinel wrapping, prompt matching, busy, and Escape-suppression tests passed.

focused_checks.name: cmd nudge requeue
focused_checks.reason: Focused command drainer and nudge mode tests passed with CGO disabled due local ICU link gap.

focused_checks.name: nudge queue
focused_checks.reason: Queue package tests passed, including drain/requeue behavior.

focused_checks.name: diff whitespace
focused_checks.reason: No whitespace or conflict-marker issues in final diff.

evidence_reuse.rationale: Original PR intent and attribution were reused; implementation and verification evidence are fresh for the replacement branch.

attribution.required_reason: Replacement carries forward PR #4461 intent from blairsilverberg/furiosa.

blocker_scan.summary: Original PR #4461 remains blocked as-is by status/review-failed, no approval, no substantive CI, and prior correctness/cleanup blockers. Replacement branch resolves the prior implementation blockers and has 5/5 post-review approvals plus focused verification. Broader tmux package baseline sleep/coreutils failure is recorded separately and is unrelated to touched behavior.

final.reason: All required PR Sheriff gates passed for the cleanup-first replacement branch head.
required_actions: After replacement lands, close or supersede PR #4461 with attribution preserved.
